title: Catalyst artifact chain-of-custody manifest (custody-v1)
description: Per-artifact sidecar recording the provenance of one captured file in the Cardano Catalyst archive. See METHODOLOGY.md §24.4 and CATALYST_ARCHIVE_REPOSITORY_DESIGN.md §6 in the observatory repository for the authoritative specification.

source_url.description: The exact URL the artifact represents, including query parameters.

source_url_aliases.description: Optional. Historical URLs that previously resolved to the same content (e.g., a relocated GitHub repo's old URL).

capture_date.description: UTC timestamp of the fetch, ISO 8601, second precision or better.

capture_method.description: Tool and flags used. Examples: 'curl -sL --user-agent cdo-preserve/1.0', 'wget --mirror --convert-links ...', 'git clone --mirror'.

capture_operator.description: Who performed the capture. GitHub handle, attribution string, or 'anonymous'.

capture_session_id.description: Optional. References the per-session CAPTURE_LOG.json for bulk captures.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the raw bytes as written to disk, lowercase hex.

content_type.description: HTTP Content-Type header value, or equivalent for non-HTTP captures.

http_status.description: HTTP response status code. Null for non-HTTP captures.

source_authority_class.description: Per METHODOLOGY.md §24.3. A=on-chain, B=official, C=at-risk platform, D=community, E=researcher.

wayback_url.description: Wayback Machine snapshot URL. Mandatory for Class C captures (the canonical fetch target). Supplementary for Class B; null permitted if Wayback submission has not yet been confirmed or has failed permanently. Null is permitted only if notes documents the failure.

post_strip_applied.description: Optional. True for Wayback-sourced HTML where the Wayback toolbar was stripped before hashing. Default false.

bytes_stored.description: Optional. True (or absent, default true) for wayback-mirror captures where the bytes live in this archive. False for wayback-pin captures where only the Wayback Machine URL is referenced and the bytes are not stored locally. When false, the artifact file at the manifest's adjacent path does NOT exist; verification is performed by re-fetching wayback_url and comparing SHA-256.
